stories.title: WTI climbs on Iran’s revenge response to Trump’s 48-hour ultimatum
stories.summary: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) – the US oil benchmark – opened Monday with a bang, extending Friday’s 3.5% advance to briefly regain the $100 level.

stories.title: Canadian Dollar holds steady amid Middle East tensions, rising oil prices
stories.summary: The USD/CAD pair trades on a flat note near 1.3725 during the early Asian trading hours on Monday. Traders will closely monitor the situation in the Middle East. Additionally, traders weigh a hawkish hold from the Federal Reserve (Fed) against a dovish hold from the Bank of Canad

stories.title: Japanese Yen stays defensive despite the Middle East war escalation
stories.summary: The Japanese Yen (JPY) is underperforming against the US Dollar (USD) in the early Asian trades on Monday, despite the Middle East conflict extending into a fourth week, with no signs of de-escalation in sight.

stories.title: Pound Sterling declines as US prepares ground operation to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
stories.summary: The GBP/USD pair faces some selling pressure near 1.3320 during the early Asian session on Monday, pressured by risk-off sentiment. Ongoing conflicts in the Middle East fuel demand for safe-haven currencies such as the US Dollar (USD) and create a headwind for the major pair.

stories.title: US considers ground operation to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
stories.summary: Citing two sources familiar with the matter, The Jerusalem Post reported early Monday, the United States (US) is preparing to launch a ground military operation to seize the Iranian island of Kharg.

stories.title: EUR/USD declines to near 1.550 amid Middle East crisis
stories.summary: The EUR/USD pair loses ground to around 1.1560 during the early Asian trading hours on Monday. The Euro (EUR) weakens against the US Dollar (USD) as heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East have spurred volatility and weighed on the riskier assets.

stories.title: Iran threatens to target financial entities that finance US military budget
stories.summary: In a social media post on Sunday, Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf, Iran’s parliament speaker, threatened financial entities that fund the US military.

stories.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Sometimes you have to 'escalate to de-escalate'
stories.summary: When asked in an NBS News interview on Sunday if President Donald Trump was “winding down” the war or “escalating” it, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said, they are not mutually exclusive. Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate.”

stories.title: Australian Dollar weakens as Middle East tensions escalate
stories.summary: The AUD/USD pair attracts some sellers to near 0.7000 during the early Asian session on Monday, pressured by risk-off sentiment. The US Dollar (USD) edges higher against the Australian Dollar (AUD) as escalating tensions in the Middle East boost safe-haven demand.

stories.title: Middle East Conflict Latest: Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to open Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: Here is a rundown of latest headlines surrounding the crisis in the Middle East as the United States (US) and Israel’s war against Iran enters the fourth week:

stories.title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD plunges, clearing key levels below $70
stories.summary: Silver price (XAG/USD) retreats late in the North American session, down by over 6.80% in the day, poised to finish the week with losses of more than 15.70%, posting its second-largest weekly loss since the one that ended down 17.39% on January 30. At the time of writing, XAG/USD

stories.title: Banxico seen holding rates at 7% amid war-driven inflation risks
stories.summary: A Reuters poll revealed that the Bank of Mexico, also known as Banxico, is expected to keep interest rates steady at 7% at the March 26 meeting amid concerns about the Middle East war.

stories.title: Forecasting the upcoming week: Hawkish Fed meets escalating Iran war
stories.summary: The US Dollar (USD)i weakened this week, with the US Dollar Index (DXY) slipping back below 100.00 to 99.60 on Friday after a surge in the middle of the week driven by the Federal Reserve's (Fed) decision to hold rates in the 3.50%-3.75% range.

stories.title: Gold slips near $4,500 as Oil rally and US yields weigh on bullion
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) price extended on Friday its losses for the eighth straight day, poised to end the week down by more than 8.50% as Oil prices continued to rally, boosting the haven appeal of the Greenback.

stories.title: USD/CHF flat as Fed outlook and Oil-driven USD demand limit downside
stories.summary: The Swiss Franc (CHF) trades flat against the US Dollar (USD) on Friday, reversing part of its earlier gains as the Greenback eases slightly from daily highs. At the time of writing, USD/CHF is trading around 0.7878 after briefly touching the 0.7900 mark.

stories.title: Gold set for third weekly loss as 'higher-for-longer' interest rate outlook weigh
stories.summary: Gold (XAU/USD) extends losses on Friday following a sharp two-day decline that pushed prices to their lowest level since early February, near the $4,500 mark.

stories.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average slides as Iran war, hawkish Fed drive fourth losing week
stories.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) tumbled around 257 points, or 0.6%, on Friday as all three major US indices tracked toward a fourth consecutive losing week. The S&P 500 fell 0.8%, while the Nasdaq Composite underperformed with a decline of 1.2%.

stories.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Pair struggles below 1.1600 as sellers maintain control
stories.summary: EUR/USD trades with a mild downside bias on Friday as a modest rebound in the US Dollar (USD) weighs on the Euro (EUR), with price action lacking follow-through buying after failing to sustain a break above the 1.1600 mark.

stories.title: GBP/USD trips down below 1.3350 as Oil surges, Fed outlook boosts US Dollar
stories.summary: GBP/USD trims some of its previous-day gains on Friday, down by 0.84%, as traders turn risk-averse amid an escalation of the Middle East war and price in no rate cuts by the Federal Reserve (Fed) in 2026. At the time of writing, the pair trades below 1.3350 after hitting a daily

stories.title: AUD/USD falls as geopolitical tensions overshadow RBA rate hike
stories.summary: AUD/USD trades lower around 0.7040 on Friday at the time of writing, down 0.68% on the day, as the pair is pressured by a return of safe-haven demand despite supportive domestic factors in Australia.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: BTC and gold divergence reflects split between retail and central banks: Analyst
stories.summary: 21Shares' macro chief looks at why Bitcoin has held relatively steady since the start of Middle East hostilities, while gold has slipped below $4,500 and key support levels.

stories.title: Scaramucci says BTC's 4-year cycle still in play, forecasts rise in Q4
stories.summary: Proponents of Bitcoin's four-year cycle theory say the price of BTC typically rises for three of the four years and declines in the final year.

stories.title: Crypto liquidations near $400M after $68K Bitcoin price dip
stories.summary: Bitcoin fell over the weekend to set up another visit to "unreliable" support, but analysis flagged a new BTC price golden cross.

stories.title: Fidelity urges SEC to move further on crypto activity by broker-dealers
stories.summary: The investment giant told the regulator's crypto task force it supports trading tokenized securities on alternative trading systems and tradfi on-chain integration.

stories.title: Resolv says no assets lost as DeFi protocols respond to $24M USR exploit
stories.summary: USR issuer Resolv Labs says its collateral pool remains intact after an exploit on Sunday that minted 80 million unbacked tokens and drove the US dollar stablecoin as low as $0.14.

stories.title: Bitcoin risks 50% drop as BTC's positive correlation with US stocks grows
stories.summary: Bitcoin’s 20-week rolling correlation with the S&P 500 has turned positive, a signal that has historically preceded major BTC price declines.

stories.title: Coinbase-backed CoinDCX founders questioned in fraud case: Report
stories.summary: Indian crypto exchange CoinDCX says the fraud complaint is part of a wider impersonation scam, citing more than 1,200 fake sites using its brand.

stories.title: ‘Hawk Tuah’ girl Hailey Welsh says memecoin implosion ‘traumatized’ her
stories.summary: Welsh warned others to stay away from crypto and said that she still does not understand anything about the sector more than a year later.

stories.title: Resolv Labs’ stablecoin depegs as attacker mints millions of tokens
stories.summary: An attacker has exploited the Resolv USR stablecoin to mint 80 million tokens and has reportedly been able to cash out at least $25 million.
